src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/CarRen.general_idea: Add Javadoc comment block with author attribution to the main application class.
Change indentation from tabs to spaces in the main method body.

src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/entity.general_idea: Add Jakarta Bean Validation annotations to enforce data integrity rules on entity fields.
Add NotNull constraints to primitive wrapper fields to prevent null values in the database.
Add NotNull constraints to primitive wrapper fields to prevent null values in the database.
Add NotNull constraints to primitive wrapper fields to prevent null values in the database.
Replace string-based model field with a typed Enum and configure it to store as STRING in the database.
Define the Model enum class to replace the previous string field for car models.
Define the Gear enum class to represent car transmission types.
Define the Fuel enum class to represent car fuel types.
Add Enum mapping for the new Gear field to store values as strings in the database.
Add Enum mapping for the new Fuel field to store values as strings in the database.
Add a ManyToOne relationship to the Dealer entity with JSON back-reference to prevent infinite recursion.
Switch ID generation from AUTO to SEQUENCE with a specific generator configuration.
Add Builder and ToString Lombok annotations to the entity class.
Add import for Hibernate Validator constraints.
Add import for Jackson annotation to handle JSON serialization issues.
Add import for Jakarta Validation NotNull constraint.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add spring-boot-starter-validation to replace the manual jakarta.validation-api dependency.
Add Flyway MySQL dependency for database migration support.
Add Flyway Maven plugin to execute database migrations during the build.
Add Jackson JSR310 datatype for Java 8+ date/time support.
Add Spring Boot Mail starter for email functionality.
Explicitly add JUnit Jupiter dependency for modern testing.
Add JUnit 4 dependency, likely for legacy test compatibility.
Remove Thymeleaf starter as the project appears to be moving to a REST-only API.

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Updated the database URL to use a cleaner connection string and a new database name.
Removed unnecessary quotes from the database password configuration.
Changed Hibernate DDL auto mode from update to validate to enforce schema consistency with migrations.
Updated Hibernate dialect from MySQL8Dialect to the generic MySQLDialect.
Enabled SQL formatting in Hibernate properties for better readability in logs.
Removed Thymeleaf configuration block as it is no longer used or needed.
src/main/resources/application.yml.before:
thymeleaf:
    cache: false
    check-template: true
    check-template-location: true
    enabled: true
    encoding: UTF-8
    mode: HTML
    prefix: file:src/main/resources/templates/
    suffix: .html
    servlet:
      content-type: text/html

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Added Flyway configuration to manage database migrations.
src/main/resources/application.yml.after:
flyway:
    enabled: true
    baseline-on-migrate: true
    locations: classpath:db/migration
    schemas: RentalCarDB

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Added server error configuration to suppress stack traces in error responses.
